category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, and IoT wireless device compliance for China-to-Iraq export under CMC type approval and ITTA technical frameworks.

title.en: China-to-Iraq Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (CMC Type Approval)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入伊拉克：CMC型号认证合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入伊拉克：CMC型號認證合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, LoRa, and IoT device documentation against Iraq CMC mandatory type approval requirements, ITTA technical standards, electrical safety under 230 V / 50 Hz (Type D / Type G plug), authorized importer and Arabic labelling requirements, and Iraq customs and import compliance considerations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙、LoRa及物联网设备文件与伊拉克CMC强制型号认证要求、ITTA技术标准、230V/50Hz电气安全（D型/G型插头）、授权进口商及阿拉伯语标签要求，以及伊拉克海关和进口合规事项的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙、LoRa及物聯網裝置文件與伊拉克CMC強制型號認證要求、ITTA技術標準、230V/50Hz電氣安全（D型/G型插頭）、授權進口商及阿拉伯語標籤要求，以及伊拉克海關和進口合規事項的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, CMC type approval, ITTA determination, legal opinion, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current Iraq telecommunications law, CMC type approval procedures, ITTA technical requirements, and applicable import regulations with qualified regulatory and legal professionals before import or sale in Iraq. Ground conditions, logistics risks, and sanctions due diligence should be assessed independently.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、CMC型号认证、ITTA裁定、法律意见、海关裁决或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于伊拉克销售前，应与合格监管及法律专业人士核验现行伊拉克电信法律、CMC型号认证程序、ITTA技术要求及适用进口法规。地面状况、物流风险及制裁合规尽职调查应独立评估。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、CMC型號認證、ITTA裁定、法律意見、海關裁決或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於伊拉克銷售前，應與合格監管及法律專業人士核驗現行伊拉克電信法律、CMC型號認證程序、ITTA技術要求及適用進口法規。地面狀況、物流風險及制裁合規盡職調查應獨立評估。

answer_first.en: The main Iraq gaps for a China-made Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, or IoT wireless device are: (1) CMC mandatory type approval — the Communications and Media Commission requires type approval for all radio and telecom terminal equipment sold or imported into Iraq; (2) EMC testing to ITU or ETSI-referenced standards as part of the CMC application dossier; (3) electrical safety compliance for 230 V / 50 Hz with plug Type D (old Indian 3-round-pin, prevalent in older buildings) and Type G (UK 3-pin, prevalent in newer buildings) — both are in common use; (4) a local Iraqi importer or authorized CMC-registered agent is required; (5) product labelling in Arabic is expected; and (6) customs and import compliance including Iraq Ministry of Trade oversight, and due diligence on US/EU sanctions exposure for the specific product and supply chain. Chinese SRRC, CCC, CE, and FCC approvals are not recognized by CMC as substitutes. The Iraqi Kurdistan Region (KRG) falls under the same federal CMC rules.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝或物联网无线设备进入伊拉克的主要差距为：(1) CMC强制型号认证 — 通信和媒体委员会要求所有在伊拉克销售或进口的无线及电信终端设备取得型号认证；(2) 作为CMC申请文件一部分的ITU或ETSI参考标准EMC测试；(3) 符合230V/50Hz、D型插头（旧式印度三圆针，常见于老旧建筑）和G型插头（英式三针，常见于新建建筑）的电气安全要求 — 两种插头均普遍使用；(4) 须有当地伊拉克进口商或CMC注册授权代理；(5) 产品须有阿拉伯语标签；以及(6) 海关及进口合规，包括伊拉克贸易部监管，以及对特定产品和供应链的美国/欧盟制裁敞口尽职调查。中国SRRC、CCC、CE及FCC批准不被CMC接受为替代。伊拉克库尔德斯坦地区（KRG）适用相同的联邦CMC规则。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩或物聯網無線裝置進入伊拉克的主要差距為：(1) CMC強制型號認證 — 通信和媒體委員會要求所有在伊拉克銷售或進口的無線及電信終端設備取得型號認證；(2) 作為CMC申請文件一部分的ITU或ETSI參考標準EMC測試；(3) 符合230V/50Hz、D型插頭（舊式印度三圓針，常見於老舊建築）和G型插頭（英式三針，常見於新建建築）的電氣安全要求 — 兩種插頭均普遍使用；(4) 須有當地伊拉克進口商或CMC註冊授權代理；(5) 產品須有阿拉伯語標籤；以及(6) 海關及進口合規，包括伊拉克貿易部監管，以及對特定產品和供應鏈的美國/歐盟制裁敞口盡職調查。中國SRRC、CCC、CE及FCC批准不被CMC接受為替代。伊拉克庫爾德斯坦地區（KRG）適用相同的聯邦CMC規則。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or upon CMC/ITTA regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
